subcodes.first_line: O wanderer of mountain and desert in the path of the Most Glorious Beauty! Many letters were sent. We cherish the hope that through divine grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوه و صحرا در سبیل جمال ابهی مکاتیب متعدده ارسال شد امید از فضل
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
